Title: Successful Login
Preconditions: User has valid login credentials (correct username and password).
Test Steps:
1. User enters "testuser" into the username field.
2. User enters "testpassword" into the password field.
3. User clicks on the login button.
4. Application sends the request to the server.
5. Server authenticates the user.
6. Server returns a success message to the application.
7. Application redirects the user to the home page.
Expected Result: User is successfully logged in and redirected to the home page.

Title: Incorrect Login Credentials
Preconditions: User has invalid login credentials (incorrect username or password).
Test Steps:
1. User enters "wronguser" into the username field.
2. User enters "wrongpassword" into the password field.
3. User clicks on the login button.
4. Application sends the request to the server.
5. Server attempts to authenticate the user.
6. Server returns an error message to the application.
7. Application displays an error message to the user.
Expected Result: User is not logged in and an error message is displayed.

Title: Calculate Emissions
Preconditions: User is logged in and has provided necessary data for emissions calculation.
Test Data: - User has provided all required data for emissions calculation.
Test Steps:
1. User logs in.
2. User navigates to the emissions calculation page.
3. User provides all required data for emissions calculation.
4. User clicks on the calculate button.
5. Application sends the request to the server.
6. Server calculates the emissions based on the provided data.
7. Server returns the calculated emissions to the application.
8. Application displays the calculated emissions to the user.
Expected Result: User sees the calculated emissions on the screen.

PROJECT OVERVIEW:
The system provides user authentication, registration, and access to various functionalities such as calculating emissions and viewing profiles. Users can log in, register, view their profile, log out, and interact with the application through different menus.
